# Mazen Chef

Mazen Chef is a Syrian and international restaurant experience in Morocco, with branches in Tangier and Rabat.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://www.mazenchef.com/
- Menu: https://www.mazenchef.com/menu.html

## Restaurant Summary

Mazen Chef serves Syrian, Middle Eastern, grill and international cuisine. The restaurant highlights live cooking shows, mezze, grilled dishes, shawarma, family platters, fresh juices and Syrian desserts.

## Locations

- Mazen Chef Tangier, Morocco. Phone: +212 539 400 466.
- Mazen Chef Rabat, Morocco. Phone: +212 537 672 002.

## Hours

Open daily from 12:00 to 03:00.

## Menu Categories

Cold Starters, Hot Starters, Fresh Salads, Assorted Platters, Sandwiches, Platter Meals, El Arabi Experience, Chawarma by Weight, Fire Grills, Premium Smoked Meats, Oriental Cuisine, Family Dishes, Fresh Juices, Syrian Desserts, Beverages.
